tasks.label: Run Docker
tasks.command: docker image inspect openclaw-agent >/dev/null 2>&1 || docker build -t openclaw-agent .; export $(grep -v '^#' ${workspaceFolder}/.env | grep -v '^$' | xargs) && docker run -d --name openclaw_agent -e WORKSPACE_REPO -e GIT_TOKEN -e GIT_USER -e OUTLINE_URL -e OUTLINE_TOKEN -e OUTLINE_ROOT_DOC -e ALLOWED_ORIGINS -e SYNC_MODE -e GATEWAY_TOKEN -e OPENCLAW_HOME=/data/openclaw -p 3349:3000 -v openclaw_agent_state:/data/openclaw --tty --interactive openclaw-agent

tasks.label: Stop Docker
tasks.command: docker stop openclaw_agent && docker rm openclaw_agent

tasks.label: Restart Docker
tasks.command: docker image inspect openclaw-agent >/dev/null 2>&1 || docker build -t openclaw-agent .; docker container inspect openclaw_agent >/dev/null 2>&1 && docker restart openclaw_agent || (export $(grep -v '^#' ${workspaceFolder}/.env | grep -v '^$' | xargs) && docker run -d --name openclaw_agent -e WORKSPACE_REPO -e GIT_TOKEN -e GIT_USER -e OUTLINE_URL -e OUTLINE_TOKEN -e OUTLINE_ROOT_DOC -e ALLOWED_ORIGINS -e SYNC_MODE -e GATEWAY_TOKEN -e OPENCLAW_HOME=/data/openclaw -p 3349:3000 -v openclaw_agent_state:/data/openclaw --tty --interactive openclaw-agent)

tasks.label: WSL Docker: Publish
tasks.command: wsl docker build -t ${input:dockerUser}/openclaw-agent:latest . && wsl docker push ${input:dockerUser}/openclaw-agent:latest
